command: Write-Output '=== LOG FILES IN MEDIA-PIPELINE ==='; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\' -Filter '*.log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '=== PLAYWRIGHT STATUS ==='; $pw = Get-Command playwright -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($pw) { Write-Output "Playwright found: $($pw.Source)"; & playwright --version 2>&1 } else { Write-Output 'playwright CLI NOT found in PATH' }; $browsers = 'C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\ms-playwright'; if (Test-Path $browsers) { Write-Output 'Browsers dir exists:'; Get-ChildItem $browsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output 'ms-playwright browser dir NOT found' }; Write-Output '=== GITHUB_TOKEN ENV CHECK ==='; if ($env:GITHUB_TOKEN) { Write-Output 'GITHUB_TOKEN is SET in system env (length: ' + $env:GITHUB_TOKEN.Length + ')' } else { Write-Output 'GITHUB_TOKEN is NOT set in system environment' }; if ($env:GEMINI_API_KEY) { Write-Output 'GEMINI_API_KEY is SET' } else { Write-Output 'GEMINI_API_KEY is NOT set in system environment' }; Write-Output '=== RECENT STDERR FROM media_bridge ==='; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\' -Filter '*.err' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\' -Filter 'nohup.out' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table; Write-Output '=== PYTHON PACKAGES CHECK ==='; & python -c "import playwright; print('playwright:', playwright.__version__)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; & python -c "import google.generativeai; print('google-generativeai: OK')" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2
description: Check log files, Playwright browser status, system env vars, and Python packages
